response.justification: While Bogdan has strong general software engineering credentials and 15+ years of experience, this role requires highly specialized expertise in embedded security, LAN switch architecture, and Linux kernel modification—none evident in his resume. Most critically, native Japanese language proficiency is a required qualification with no indication he possesses it. His recent career (2020-present) has focused entirely on web/backend systems (TypeScript, Node.js, data platforms), and his last embedded systems work ended in 2018. The gap between his generalist, application-level experience and this specialized embedded networking security role is disqualifying.
strengths: 15+ years of proven software development across multiple domains and technology stacks
Strong systems-level experience with C/C++ (National Instruments), Linux infrastructure, and CI/CD tooling
Demonstrated ability to master complex technical domains and rapidly learn new technologies
concerns: No evidence of native or proficient Japanese language skills despite being an explicit requirement
Career trajectory moved away from embedded systems (last embedded work 2016-2018) toward web/backend development
Complete absence of security engineering, embedded networking, or domain-specific protocol expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP, Linux kernel modification)

key_factors.factor: General software craftsmanship and learning ability
